items.title: OEM Manufacturing
items.desc: Sample-based, build-to-print production with strict quality control and confidentiality.

items.title: ODM Design

items.title: CMT Processing
items.desc: Client supplies fabric + trims. Factory handles cut, make, trim and finishing.

items.title: Logistics Integration
items.desc: Direct shipping worldwide (FOB/CIF/DDP). Customs, booking, cross-border — all handled.

hero.title: Three Manufacturing Models
hero.subtitle: OEM / ODM / CMT — pick the partnership that fits your brand best

oem.title: OEM Manufacturing
oem.lead: You provide the tech-pack, sample or fabric. We replicate with precision and speed.
oem.suitable: Best for brands with in-house design teams, looking to scale production cost-effectively.

odm.title: ODM Design
odm.lead: Our in-house R&D team designs based on your brand DNA and current trends.
odm.suitable: Best for start-ups, e-commerce brands, and buyers without dedicated design teams.

cmt.title: CMT Processing
cmt.lead: You supply fabric and trims. We handle cutting, sewing, finishing — pure manufacturing.
cmt.suitable: Best for clients with stable fabric sourcing, capacity expansion needs, or special process requirements.

items.title: 12-Factory Pool
items.desc: A full-category factory pool, precisely matched to your needs

items.title: Full QC
items.desc: AQL 2.5 standard, on-site QC team throughout production

hero.title:
Bridging China Manufacturing
with Global Brands
hero.lead: Headquartered in Shenzhen, FOSHAN GarmentMaster is a one-stop apparel manufacturing sourcing hub for overseas clients. We've aggregated 200+ audited factories across six major Chinese textile clusters, offering OEM / ODM / CMT models.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.lead: Reshape global apparel sourcing from China — with industrial standards, factory efficiency, and a modern digital experience.

items.title: Transparency
items.desc: Transparent pricing, transparent progress, transparent fees

items.title: Professional
items.desc: 20+ years industry experience, deep global client service

items.title: Win-Win
items.desc: Long-term thinking, growing with our clients

team.title: The Team
team.lead: A team of 20+ year apparel trade veterans and internet product experts — combining industry depth with user experience.

geo.title: Full Coverage of China's Textile Clusters
geo.lead: 200+ partner factories across 5 Foshan clusters. From raw material to finished garment — within 200km.
